## Checklist

- [ ] I ran ShellCheck / CI checks.
- [ ] I tested `sh scripts/install.sh --dry-run`.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if commands changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/installer.md` if setup behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/getting-started.md` if manual setup changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/advanced-setup.md` if installer behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/troubleshooting.md` if errors/checks changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/ai-agents.md` if OpenCode behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `docs/quickref.md` if commands changed.
